finding: `ATM_EMERGENCY_LANE_APPROVAL_REQUIRED` reports an emergency approve command, but omits `--allowed-flag` guidance for required backend flags such as `--historical-delivery`, causing the first lease to fail with `ATM_EMERGENCY_FLAG_NOT_APPROVED`.
expectedBehavior: When a protected backend command requires an emergency lease and non-default flags, the required command should include the needed `--allowed-flag` entries or explain that flags must be approved explicitly before use.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in `packages/cli/src/commands/emergency/gate.ts`: the approval-required error dedupes protected flags into `requiredAllowedFlags`, appends matching `--allowed-flag` arguments to `details.requiredCommand`, and warns that missing flag approval will fail with `ATM_EMERGENCY_FLAG_NOT_APPROVED`. Validation: `node --strip-types packages/cli/src/commands/emergency/__tests__/gate.test.ts` and `npm run validate:cli -- --mode validate`.
followUp: Keep `packages/cli/src/commands/emergency/__tests__/gate.test.ts`; it proves `--historical-delivery` is pre-approved in the first generated emergency approve command while flag-free commands stay backward compatible.
